MASTER CALENDAR COURT (CONTINUED)

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-22-2002 Set For Trial On Oct-22-02 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: Matter on calendar for further settlement discussions, having been referred on 10/21/02 by the Presiding Judge. Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff; Reporter: Mary J. Hinds. APPEARANCES: Plaintiff appears by Jack Maclean and Calvin Nante, with counsel, Michael Rossoff; There being no settlement, the trial is referred back to the department of the Presiding Judge for re-assignment.

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-21-2002 Continued To Oct-22-02 At 12:00 P.M. In Dept 210

MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerks: P.Dias/J. Stokes; Reporter: Brenda Fields. Michael S. Rossoff, Esq. appeared for the plaintiff and the defendant appeared in pro per. The case did not settle and the trial date is confirmed.
